home.hero_subtitle: Book sessions with the best coaches near you
home.search_placeholder: Search by city or postal code...
home.step1_desc: Find a coach near you by city or postal code
home.step2_desc: Choose a time slot that suits you in the calendar
home.step3_desc: Meet your coach and achieve your goals
home.faq1_a: FitMatch is the platform that connects clients with fitness coaches near them. You can search by city, postal code or gym, view profiles (reviews, specialties, rates) and book your session easily.
home.faq2_q: How do I book a session on FitMatch?
home.faq2_a:
Method 1: Via FitMatch
1️⃣ Enter your gym name.
2️⃣ Choose a coach from those working at this gym.
3️⃣ Click on their profile and book your session directly.

Method 2: Via the coach's private link
1️⃣ Visit your coach's social media (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook).
2️⃣ Click on the FitMatch private link shared in their bio.
3️⃣ Book your session directly online — quick and easy!
home.faq3_q: How does payment work on FitMatch?
home.faq3_a: 💳 Online payment is available! You can pay for your session directly on FitMatch via a secure Stripe system (Visa, Mastercard, American Express). The coach receives the payment automatically to their account.
home.faq4_a: 🔄 It depends on the coach! Each coach chooses whether to enable online payment or not. If payment is disabled, you arrange directly with them (cash, transfer, etc.).
home.faq5_q: How do I manage my sessions on FitMatch?
home.faq5_a: From your personal space, you can view, modify or cancel your sessions. You also receive automatic reminders before each appointment.
home.faq6_q: How do I appear as a coach on FitMatch?
home.faq6_a: Sign up as a coach, complete your profile (specialties, photos, rates, gyms where you coach). You'll be visible as soon as a client searches in your area or clicks on your gym.
home.become_coach_desc: Grow your client base, manage bookings, and increase your earnings with FitMatch
home.stat3_desc: Of sessions booked outside business hours

coach_signup.client_link: I am a client — I want to book a coach
coach_signup.stats_title: The #1 platform to manage your fitness coaching business
coach_signup.stats_subtitle: 50,000 coaches trust the coaching reference, used by over 14 million users.
coach_signup.stat5_label: New clients per month on average
coach_signup.attract_title: Attract more clients and gain undeniable credibility in fitness
coach_signup.attract_subtitle: Become the coach clients choose with confidence.
coach_signup.benefit1_desc: With FitMatch, your profile inspires trust, highlights your transformations, reviews ⭐ and specialties. You leave a lasting impression on your clients.
coach_signup.benefit2_desc: Your profile is optimized to directly reach your target audience: weight training, weight loss, muscle gain, women's coaching... FitMatch highlights your strengths where your clients expect them.
coach_signup.benefit3_desc: Be perceived as a credible and premium professional, with a clear profile, professional photos, and a uniform presence across all platforms.
coach_signup.benefit4_desc: Your FitMatch profile doesn't age. With your reviews, results and simple updates, you build a solid reputation for the long term.
coach_signup.benefit5_desc: Your success is our priority. If FitMatch doesn't bring you value, you can cancel your subscription at any time, with no hidden fees.
coach_signup.step1_item3: Unique personalized link for your networks
coach_signup.step5_item1: New gym members find you on Insta
coach_signup.step5_item2: You share your unique link in your bio
coach_signup.step6_item1: A unique link in your bio
coach_signup.reminder_title: Clients who show up to their appointments.
coach_signup.reminder_desc: You can finally forget about those who forget. With automatic reminder emails and online confirmation, your clients receive a notification before each session.
coach_signup.testimonials_subtitle: Verified profiles, concrete results, and clients who book with confidence.
coach_signup.faq1_q: How does FitMatch work for my clients?
coach_signup.faq1_a: Clients easily find a personal trainer near them, by gym or city. They can view profiles, read reviews, and book a session directly online through FitMatch.
coach_signup.faq2_q: Will FitMatch bring me new clients?
coach_signup.faq2_a: Yes. FitMatch showcases your profile to thousands of active athletes in your area. Thanks to local SEO and client reviews, your visibility increases and you receive regular bookings.
coach_signup.faq3_q: How much does FitMatch Pro subscription cost?
coach_signup.faq3_a: €29/month or €560/year (20% discount), with no commission on your sessions. You keep 100% of your earnings. No commitment: you can cancel anytime from your coach portal.
coach_signup.faq4_q: Is FitMatch subscription profitable for a coach?
coach_signup.faq4_a: Yes, from your first bookings, the subscription is already profitable. Many coaches say they fill their slots quickly thanks to FitMatch.
coach_signup.faq5_q: How does the profile setup work on FitMatch?
coach_signup.faq5_a: It's simple. You create your account in a few minutes, add your specialties, training locations, and photos. Your profile is then validated and publicly visible on FitMatch.
coach_signup.faq6_q: What do you do with my personal data?
coach_signup.faq6_a: Your data is protected and used only for managing your account and bookings. FitMatch respects your privacy and never shares your information without your consent.
coach_signup.faq7_q: How can I share my FitMatch profile on social media?
coach_signup.faq7_a: Each coach has a unique personalized link to their FitMatch profile. You can copy this link directly from your coach portal and share it on Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, or in your bio.
coach_signup.faq8_q: Can I connect my social media to my FitMatch profile?
coach_signup.faq8_a: Yes! On your FitMatch profile, you can add links to your Instagram, TikTok, or other social media accounts. Clients can see your transformations, posts, and the vibe of your coaching sessions.
coach_signup.testimonial1_quote: Honestly FitMatch changed my game. New gym members find me on Insta, they click on my FitMatch link... and they book directly. Before I had to respond to 100 DMs a day, now everything is organized, payment, schedule, everything.
coach_signup.testimonial2_quote: What I love about FitMatch is that new gym members can book me without talking to me. They look at my Insta → click on the link → direct booking. Zero wasted time, zero confusion.
coach_signup.testimonial3_quote: Since I put FitMatch in my Insta bio, I get bookings every day. New gym members come, they search 'coach', they find my Insta, they click... bam, confirmed appointment. It doubled my clients.
coach_signup.testimonial4_quote: I thought it was just an extra thing, but actually FitMatch has become my main tool. No need to explain how to book anymore: people see my Insta, they click on the link and everything is ready. My sessions are full every week.
coach_signup.testimonial5_quote: I put FitMatch in my Insta bio, I swear I've never had so many requests. Girls from the gym discover me on Insta, they click on the link, they book directly. It's clean, it's pro, and it gives me a real brand image.
coach_signup.testimonial6_quote: I train fighters but also people who want to get in shape. With FitMatch, new gym members now find me in one click: they see my Insta, they book via FitMatch, I don't even need to answer. Efficiency at max.
coach_signup.instagram_title: Your Instagram link becomes a booking machine
coach_signup.instagram_desc: Put your FitMatch link in your bio. Every new gym member who discovers you on Insta can now book you in one click, without DM, without hassle.
